memberdef.definition: using zmbt::lang::Operator::binary_transform = std::function<V(V const&, V const&)>
memberdef.name: binary_transform

memberdef.definition: using zmbt::lang::Operator::binary_predicate = std::function<bool(V const&, V const&)>
memberdef.name: binary_predicate

memberdef.name: handle_is_truth

memberdef.name: handle_is_truth

briefdescription.para: Is approximately equal (only applicable to floating point numbers)
Operator with T as type decorator.
Operator with T as type decorator.
Retrieve registered operator instance if it exists, throw otherwise.

memberdef.argsstring: (lang::Keyword const &keyword, boost::json::value const &lhs, boost::json::value const &rhs) const
memberdef.name: apply

detaileddescription.para: For unary operators, lhs is nullptr

briefdescription.para: Signal transformation and comparison handler. Enables type erasure.
